package.name: go2_brain
package.description: Phase 5 autonomy stub. A single node (stub_brain) that closes the social-nav loop: it consumes the ground-truth /people perception stub and the robot's /odom, runs a basic Social Force Model, and publishes /cmd_vel at 20 Hz. It REPLACES teleop as the /cmd_vel producer and is a deliberately simple placeholder that the IT2-FLS controller (Phase 7) will later swap in for at the exact same /cmd_vel interface.
